heading: Office of Congressional Accessibility Services
label: 2251 Office of Congressional Accessibility Services
notes: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (a) of amended .section 411 of Pub. L. 110–437section 411 of Pub. L. 110–437section 2172 of this title
amendments: CodificationSection is comprised of . Subsec. (a) of amended .section 411 of Pub. L. 110–437section 411 of Pub. L. 110–437section 2172 of this title

children.heading: Specific functions
children.label: b Specific functions
children.text: The Director of Accessibility Services shall submit to the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate and the Committee on House Administration of the House of Representatives a list of the specific functions that the Office of Congressional Accessibility Services will perform in carrying out this part with the approval of the Committee on Rules and Administration of the Senate and the Committee on House Administration of the House of Representatives. The Director of Accessibility Services shall submit the list not later than 30 days after the transfer date.

children.heading: Transition for current Director
children.label: c Transition for current Director
children.text: The individual who serves as the head of the Congressional Special Services Office as of , shall be the first Director of Accessibility Services appointed by the Congressional Accessibility Services Board under .October 20, 2008section 2172 of this title
